title: 家事テクだってお任せよ！

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Excuse me? Hello? Trainer, are you here?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Excuse me? Hello? Trainer, are you here?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering if you had a sewing kit. Grass's
uniform is a little frayed.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Great! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for the inconvenience.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Just you hold still, Grass. I'll fix you right up.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What? No, I can handle it myself. You don't have
to do all this...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, don't be shy! I happen to like sewing,
you know! ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
W-well, in that case, I would very much
appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With practiced hands, Maruzensky mends Grass
Wonder's uniform flawlessly.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that should do it! A pretty good job, if I
say so myself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. I couldn't help noticing how
carefully and skillfully you worked.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Your attention to detail far exceeds my own...
You really are incredible, Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, stop. You're making me blush! I'm glad that
you feel you can count on me, though.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty well-versed in practical skills like this,
so just give me a shout whenever you need
help! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My mom and our maid. They taught me a lot of
things when I was a little girl.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Like how you shouldn't always rely on others. It's
thanks to them that I learned to do things for
myself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That's right. You live by yourself outside the
academy, not in the dorm, right?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Your mom and the teachers must trust that you
can take good care of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh! Uh, y-yeah, right... I'm super independent...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Did I say something strange?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: No, not at all! Don't worry about it!
choice_data_list: You've always been a strong person.
Isn't it hard to live alone?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I guess so! People have been telling me that for a
long time.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I always did household chores with our maid
rather than just letting her take care of me...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And in school, I tried to help the younger
students. I was quite popular.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As a child, you must have been a reliable,
older-sister type, just like you are now.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I would even try to help out the older
students at times.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I've often been told that I come off older than I
actually am... I guess I just exude an aura of
maturity!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I've just always liked being counted on. I'll lend a
hand with anything.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Big Sister Maruzensky is ready to help in two
shakes of a lamb's tail!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: In two... shakes?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And don't you forget it, Grass! Heehee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There may be more reasons why she comes off as
older, but it might be better not to point that
out...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, helping people out so much does tend to
keep me busy...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In our case, we also have academic work and
racing to deal with. It must be difficult to balance
it all with daily chores.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't worry. I enjoy doing it, so it's no bother
at all.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'm making sure to take breathers every
day!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You do?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's right. And when I say breather... I mean a
drive!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: If I'm having a bad day or feeling stressed out...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I just take Tata for a spin and leave all that in the
dust!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Though... driving by myself isn't always enough,
so I usually try to take someone with me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I suppose you can rely on your trainer to go
on drives with you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heehee! I'm glad to hear we're on the same page!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The best way to care for me is through your
actions. I'm counting on your support! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems fairly clear that Maruzensky will be
asking me to take a drive in the near future...
